scripts.check: pnpm run type-check && pnpm run test:datagrid:unit
scripts.test:all: pnpm --filter @affino/export-xlsx test && pnpm --filter @affino/projection-engine test && pnpm -w run test:datagrid:unit
scripts.test:all:full: pnpm -w run test:all && pnpm -w run test:datagrid:integration && pnpm -w run test:datagrid:contracts && pnpm -w run test:datagrid:regressions && pnpm -w run test:datagrid:strict-contracts
scripts.test:datagrid:unit: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-core test:unit && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-format test && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-chrome test && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-gantt test && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-worker test && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue test:unit && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-orchestration test:unit
scripts.test:datagrid:contracts: pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-core test:contracts && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-vue test:contracts && pnpm --filter @affino/datagrid-orchestration test:contracts

scripts.quality:lock:datagrid: pnpm run quality:architecture:datagrid && pnpm run quality:facade:datagrid && pnpm run quality:perf:datagrid && pnpm run test:datagrid:strict-contracts && pnpm run quality:gates:datagrid && pnpm run quality:gates:datagrid:tree
scripts.quality:lock:datagrid:parity: pnpm run quality:lock:datagrid && pnpm run test:e2e:datagrid:parity
scripts.quality:lock:datagrid:parity:full: pnpm run quality:lock:datagrid:parity && pnpm run bench:regression
